emails.subject: The Predictors
emails.body: The Predictors Hi Vince What's happening with The Prediction Co? Is it still a live concern, or are Enron not following up? Steve

emails.subject: RE: The Predictors
emails.body: RE: The Predictors Steve, I will talk to Greg in 25 minutes about it. They sent a proposal. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: RE: The Predictors
emails.body: I'm still interested in being involved, even if I'm wearing an EGM rather than Research hat. Steve To: Leppard, Steve
